title: Syncher
description: Syncher syncs player currency across servers instantly with MySQL, ensuring consistent balances and reliable performance.
body:
# **Syncher**  
### **Synchronize Player Balances Across Your Network**  

**Syncher** is a lightweight, high-performance plugin designed to keep player currency synchronized across multiple Minecraft servers. Whether you're managing a small server cluster or a large network, Syncher ensures that players' money is always consistent and accurate.  

---

## **Features**  
- 🚀 **Blazing-Fast Synchronization**  
   Instantly updates player balances across all connected servers for a seamless gameplay experience.  

- 🗄️ **MySQL-Powered Storage**  
   Centralized data storage ensures reliability and scalability, perfect for any size server network.  

- 🔄 **Seamless Integration**  
   Works effortlessly with your existing server setup to deliver a unified economy system.  

- ✅ **Data Integrity Guaranteed**  
   Prevents conflicts and data loss, ensuring accurate player balances at all times.  

---

## **Premium**
- 💎 **Newest versions and up-to-date features are available [here](https://builtbybit.com/resources/syncher.58660/)**

---

## **Why Choose Syncher?**  
Syncher is built for performance and reliability, ensuring your players enjoy a consistent experience across your server network. With its blazing-fast synchronization and robust MySQL integration, Syncher is the perfect solution for modern Minecraft server administrators.  

---

### **Installation**  
1. Download the plugin and place it in your server’s `plugins` folder.  
2. Configure the `config.yml` to connect to your MySQL database.  
3. Restart your servers and enjoy synchronized player balances!  

---

## **Support and Feedback**  
For help or to report issues, visit our [Discord](https://discord.gg/PwcFv4tYX8). Feedback and suggestions are always welcome!
